# TOOLS.md — SSE (deny-by-default)

Any tool NOT listed under Allowed is DENIED. A tool listed under both
Allowed and Denied is DENIED (deny wins).

## Allowed

- repository.read
- repository.write_scoped
- sandbox.exec
- test.run

## Denied

- customer_data.export
- external.communicate
- production.deploy

## Policy references

- model_policy: reasoning-max
- memory_policy: security
- risk_ceiling: drafts-only-human-held
- required_evals: threat_model_quality, finding_accuracy
